text.p: LATTER OF COMPLAINT ABOUT THE POOR
STATE OF ROADS IN MY TOWN.
Good day Sir, I wish to a citizen of local Government area of State write this letter of on the Issue of poor roads in my town.

Sir, when you first came in to power, you told the people that your number 1 feature aim is to develop the local Government.and now Sir we all c on behalf of the People of local Government I wish to Commend you on your effort but Sir I want to state that the road reaching to from
' local Government is bacd and needs to be repaired, Sir We believe that you Can help us lay up a Complain to the Governor of the State because the road has been di sent many drivers to their early Grave.

Sir, the road is full of pot holes that even drivers find it hard to drive on. most people had to travel usuing the road Instead of that road, the road had caused traders a lot of damages to their goods and we would like you state down please that the road be expanded because of rough drivers who drive carelessly on the road.

Sir, Many villagers also have lost their lives due to the poor road and Its disavandages Sir, If you will please hear our complaint and come to our aid we will be Grateful because our dream is to see to the fact that the road is well developed, secured and ready for business, Sir please all our hope is on your recieving this letter and taken action on this matter thanks.
